This family includes over 2,000 species found in tropical and subtropical regions worldwide. Richella grandiflora is native to Southeast Asia and is often found in tropical forests. The classification of Richella grandiflora as a species within the Annonaceae family highlights its unique characteristics and evolutionary history.
